nasb.text: They went to Ophir and took four hundred and twenty talents of gold from there, and brought it to King Solomon.

esv.text: And they went to Ophir and brought from there gold, 420 talents, and they brought it to King Solomon.

cnv.text: 他們到達了俄斐，從那裡取得黃金約有一萬四千公斤，運到所羅門王那裡。

ccb.text: 从俄斐为所罗门王运回了十四吨黄金。
